arts.ttl: Roma’s Ranieri: “Hermoso? He Rightly Wants to Play, and I Can’t Guarantee That to Anyone”
arts.sum: Roma are gearing up for their final match in the first phase of the UEFA Europa League against Eintracht Frankfurt, a standout performer in this part of the competition. The German side have amassed 16 points in 7 matches, just three points behind Lazio in the general standings, with 14 goals scored and 8 conceded. The post Roma’s Ranieri: “Hermoso? He Rightly Wants to Play, and I Can’t Guarantee That to Anyone” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Europa League | Roma v Frankfurt: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the UEFA Europa League league phase reaches its climactic finale, Roma find themselves in a precarious position as they prepare to host Eintracht Frankfurt at the Stadio Olimpico on Thursday evening. The stakes could not be higher for the Giallorossi, who must secure a victory to guarantee their progression to the knockout rounds. arts.ttl: Roma Linked to Decorated Manchester United Midfielder
arts.sum: Claudio Ranieri has leaned heavily on Leandro Paredes, but Roma aren’t yet certain he’ll stay, both in January and especially next summer, and have earmarked Casemiro should they need a new man at the position. The post Roma Linked to Decorated Manchester United Midfielder appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli’s Buongiorno Nears Return: Potential Bench Role Against Roma
arts.sum: Napoli's centre-back Alessandro Buongiorno is on the verge of making his comeback after being sidelined since mid-December due to injury. The upcoming match against Roma at the Olimpico Stadium could see the Italian defender return to action, potentially from the bench. arts.ttl: Roma Reignite Pursuit of Talismanic Georgian Forward
arts.sum: Roma have laid eyes on Georges Mikautadze amid their search for new weapons but Olympique Lyonnais, despite their financial crunch, have set a very robust price tag for him, €30M.
